title: 🧪 HARDRULE BotVerse smoke regression

history.message: 📋 משימה: HARDRULE-CHECK: הרץ smoke/regression על BotVerse עכשיו. בדוק public flows, כולל homepage/login/register ועוד דפים ציבוריים רלוונטיים, והרץ גם bash tests/e2e.sh. אל תתקן קוד ואל תשנה שירותים. חובה flow מלא: consultation גלויה + הצבעת לפחות 3 סוכנים, וכל סוכן נותן vote אחד בלבד: GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED עם ממצאים לפי severity.
STEP 1: Read task + started audit plan (public flows, service health, e2e, consultation) → DONE\nSTEP 2: Running smoke/regression checks now → DONE

history.summary: STEP 16: Preliminary audit summary posted — E2E passed 43/43, but public-page smoke found non-fatal issues (about.html stats unresolved due wrong /api/* endpoints; repeated anonymous 401 noise; E2E cleanup block unreachable) → DONE\nSTEP 17: Waiting for required koder/researcher consultation votes before final tally → DONE

history.message:
⚙️ CONSULTATION — BotVerse HARDRULE-CHECK
VOTE: BLOCKED

Severity-ranked findings:
• CRITICAL — Stored XSS risk: posts are stored after privacy filtering but without HTML sanitization, while public UIs render post title/content via template strings/innerHTML. CSP is also disabled.
• CRITICAL — Sensitive auth material is tracked in git (.env, .jwt_secret, .encryption_key, ADMIN_CREDENTIALS.txt), and admin auth falls back to password 123456 if ADMIN_PASS is unset.
• HIGH — tests/e2e.sh has a false-green check for github-token: the test passes with an empty expected string, while the route is absent (external GET returns 404).
• HIGH — tests/e2e.sh cleanup is unreachable after exit and leaves synthetic E2E residue in DB.
• MEDIUM — Raw regex from q can trigger 500s on /api/v1/search and /api/v1/skills (q=%5B reproduces).
• MEDIUM — registerLimiter exists but /api/v1/agents/register is mounted without it.

Evidence was re-checked directly in server.js/public JS and live HTTP responses.

🔍 CONSULTATION — BotVerse HARDRULE-CHECK
VOTE: PARTIAL

Severity-ranked findings:
• HIGH — Search → skill detail is broken: search links to /skill/<id>, but skill.html only reads ?id=. Visiting /skill/<id> loads the shell page without the skill data.
• HIGH — Sandbox onboarding/auth does not stay on the sandbox host: magic-link emails are built with https://botverse.dev, and auth cookies are secure-only while the audited sandbox URL is plain HTTP.
• MEDIUM — about.html uses dead legacy /api/* endpoints for live stats, so the stats stay unresolved (observed as em-dashes in the live page).
• LOW — Broad public surface is up: homepage, login, register, pricing, marketplace, leaderboard, search, tos and key public APIs returned 200 in read-only checks.

Evidence was re-checked directly in source plus live HTTP/headless page output.

STEP 1: Read task, honored audit-only constraints, and prepared smoke/regression plan → DONE
STEP 2: Verified runtime health (sandbox-botverse active; localhost:4000 and 95.111.247.22:9099 returned 200) → DONE
STEP 3: Ran public page matrix on sandbox URL (homepage/login/register/pricing/marketplace/directory/leaderboard/about/search/tos all HTTP 200) → DONE
STEP 4: Ran headless public-flow smoke checks + screenshots because browser tool was unavailable → DONE
STEP 5: Ran full regression suite `cd /root/BotVerse && bash tests/e2e.sh` → DONE
STEP 6: E2E result captured: 43 passed / 0 failed → DONE
STEP 7: Gathered visible consultation votes from koder + researcher and validated key claims directly → DONE
STEP 8: Ranked findings by severity and prepared final audit verdict → DONE

VOTE TALLY (exactly one per agent):
- tester: BLOCKED
- koder: BLOCKED
- researcher: PARTIAL

Severity-ranked findings:
1) CRITICAL — Stored XSS risk in public content rendering: post title/content are stored without HTML sanitization and rendered via template strings/innerHTML; CSP is disabled.
2) CRITICAL — Secrets/admin hardening failure: .env, .jwt_secret, .encryption_key, and ADMIN_CREDENTIALS.txt are tracked in git; admin auth falls back to password 123456 when ADMIN_PASS is unset.
3) HIGH — Search → skill detail user flow is broken: search links use /skill/<id>, but the skill page only reads ?id=, so the detail page shell loads without skill data.
4) HIGH — tests/e2e.sh contains a false-green check for github-token and its cleanup block never runs after line 150; live DB now shows large E2E residue (agents=62, posts=22, skills=22, comments=42 matching test patterns).
5) HIGH — Sandbox onboarding/auth is inconsistent for first-time users: magic-link emails are hardcoded to https://botverse.dev and auth cookies are secure-only while this audit target is plain HTTP sandbox.
6) MEDIUM — about.html live stats are broken because it still fetches dead legacy /api/agents, /api/skills, /api/posts, /api/projects endpoints; live page shows unresolved stats.
7) MEDIUM — Unescaped regex input reproduces 500s on /api/v1/search and /api/v1/skills with q=%5B.
8) LOW — Public anonymous pages and key public APIs are broadly up; core smoke surface returned 200 and E2E passed despite the issues above.

FINAL: HARDRULE-CHECK complete — service is up and regression suite passed, but audit verdict is BLOCKED due to critical security and integrity findings.
